<?php namespace Vonage\ProactiveConnect\Objects; use Vonage\Entity\Hydrator\ArrayHydrateInterface; class ListItem implements ArrayHydrateInterface { public function __construct(protected array $data) { } public function set($name, $value): static { $this->data[$name] = $value; return $this; } public function get(string $name) { return $this->data[$name]; } public function fromArray(array $data): void { $this->data = $data; } public function toArray(): array { return [ 'data' => $this->data ]; } }
